summary: Iter 41 cross-kind estimate pairing — Backend (6/6 pytest) + Frontend (6/6 acceptance) ALL PASS. Verified: auth gate (401), 404 on missing estimate, siding→windows pair with -W suffix, idempotency (same paired id on second /pair call), windows-no-suffix→siding with -S suffix, windows-with-W→siding strips suffix, GET /api/estimates includes paired_estimate_number+paired_estimate_kind. FE: HOVER apply emits the expected toast 'Imported HOVER: 0 new + 48 updated · saved · Also created paired Windows estimate EST-207239-W', chain-link icon (data-testid='paired-link-{id}') renders on both /dashboard and /dashboard/windows with correct cross-pointing tooltips, click navigates between paired estimates bidirectionally, paired windows editor shows copied customer 'Pair Smoke' / address '100 Main St' / estimator 'Howard', EST# 'EST-207239-W' with -W suffix, and 29 Vero openings live on the paired windows estimate.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/estimates.py pair_estimate(): clean idempotency check + stale-pointer recovery (re-creates if existing paired doc was deleted). EST# scheme correctly handles all three cases (siding→-W, windows-with-W→strip, windows-no-suffix→-S).
routes/estimates.py list_estimates(): efficient single batched lookup of paired_docs by id-in list (no N+1). Properly scopes by company_id on the join query.
models.py EstimateIn.paired_estimate_id is Optional[str] — good; the PUT path uses exclude_none so the back-pointer won't get clobbered by FE PUTs that omit it.

HoverImportButton split-by-tab logic correctly routes vinyl/ascend/lp_smart to source-kind and windows to paired-kind; vero_openings/mezzo_openings go to paired side. Toast text correctly surfaces the paired estimate number.
Dashboard.jsx chain-link icon renders only when paired_estimate_id truthy; title attribute uses paired_estimate_number for tooltip. data-testid format 'paired-link-{id}' enables robust testing.
seed_data_creation: All test estimates (EST-PAIR1*, EST-PAIR2*, EST-PAIR3*, Pair Smoke, plus residual EST-018125/EST-018125-W from earlier playground run) were cleaned up via DELETE /api/estimates/{id}. DB is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HOVER PDF cached at /tmp/hover_sample.pdf. Login lands on / (workspace chooser); navigate explicitly to /dashboard or /dashboard/windows. Job Information field testids are: cust-name, cust-address, estimator-name, est-num, est-date — DO NOT rely on placeholder text (the inputs have no placeholders, only adjacent <label> elements). The HOVER claude extraction takes ~25-40s; use timeout=90000 on wait_for_selector('hover-modal'). Chain-link icon testid is paired-link-{estimate_id}; title attribute is 'Paired: EST-XXXX' (or '-W').
